sites.name: El Grelle
sites.notes: East side of the Torre de Hércules promontory — sheltered from dominant NW swell by the headland

sites.name: A Furna
sites.notes: North-facing rocky coast near Torre de Hércules, caves and overhangs

sites.name: La Catedral
sites.notes: Northwestern tip near San Pedro — large rock formations, fully exposed to Atlantic swell

sites.name: Mar Egeo
sites.notes: North-facing wall dive near La Catedral, exposed to N-NW swell
